title: Quick Sort
description: Implement Quick Sort. Sort an integer array in-place using the quicksort algorithm with Lomuto partition scheme.
key_concept: Pick pivot, partition into smaller/larger, recurse. O(n log n) avg / O(n²) worst, in-place O(log n) stack space, unstable but fastest in practice
when_best: In-memory sorting where average case matters, pivot randomization avoids worst case, cache-friendly access patterns

hints.L1: Choose last element as pivot. Partition: keep index of 'smaller element boundary', swap elements <= pivot to left side.
hints.L2: Lomuto: i=-1; for j in 0..n-1: if arr[j]<=pivot: i++; swap(i,j); swap(i+1, pivot_index). Recurse on arr[lo..pi-1] and arr[pi+1..hi].
hints.L3: def partition(arr,lo,hi): pivot=arr[hi]; i=lo-1; for j in lo..hi-1: if arr[j]<=pivot: i++; swap(i,j); swap(i+1,hi); return i+1

complexity.time: O(n log n) avg / O(n²) worst
